_note: Inputs are upstream TTN examples (Apache-2.0) plus synthetic frames; expected.data is authored to this module's vocabulary by running the upstream reference decoder as an oracle and mapping its fields to vibration.* keys. Acceleration frame (report 0x01) -> vibration.accelerationX/Y/Z (g) + battery (V); velocity frame (report 0x02) -> vibration.velocityX/Y/Z (mm/s); low-battery high bit -> lowBattery extra. Device-info, short payloads, and fPort 7 config responses carry no measurement and are errors.

uplink.description: Acceleration report (report type 0x01) - X/Y/Z in g, battery 3.6 V
Acceleration report with low-battery flag (bytes[3] high bit set)
Velocity report (report type 0x02) - X/Y/Z in mm/s
Startup / device-info frame (report type 0x00) carries no measurement
Configure report response on fPort 7 carries no measurement
Truncated data frame on fPort 6 is rejected
